caption: A man with glasses and dark hair tied back performs in front of a wall of horizontal wooden slats. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark blue vest with blue floral embroidery, and a red and white decorative neckpiece. He stands behind a microphone on a black boom stand and holds an acoustic guitar. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone while slightly shifting his head and facial expression. In the later frames, the tops of people's heads become visible at the bottom of the frame, suggesting an audience. The lighting and background remain consistent throughout the clip.
